name: Best School Bus Inc
districts_or_customers: Bergen County / Hackensack area (NJDOE-registered school bus contractor)
recent_news: No M&A or press coverage found; listed in NJDOE 2020-21 contractor codes roster as a registered school bus contractor.
fit_notes: Small Bergen County contractor (~32 employees, ~$3M rev) with apparent single-owner profile (Sato). Could be a low-AUM tuck-in to densify Summit's NJ footprint, but very limited public footprint; needs operator-level diligence before pursuit.

name: Kerry Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: South Jersey districts; Cumberland County area; specialty in special-needs student transport
recent_news: No recent M&A news; long-standing independent operator since 1980 serving South Jersey.
fit_notes: 45+ year independent, woman-owned South Jersey operator with documented special-needs specialization - attractive tuck-in profile for Summit (margin-accretive SPED mix, succession optionality given founder-led tenure). Revenue/fleet figures vary across data sources; needs CIM-level scrub.

name: National Charter Bus Cleveland
owner_or_parent: National Charter Bus (brokerage; not an asset-owning operator)
districts_or_customers: None directly contracted; brokers charter trips (incl. K-12 field trips) via third-party vendor network
recent_news: No M&A news. Cleveland office at 1400 E 105th St Ste 103 functions as a sales/reservations node of the national broker.
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. National Charter Bus is a nationwide charter brokerage - does not own or operate buses, partners with vendor network. Cleveland 'location' is a reservations office, not a fleet-owning operator. De-prioritize.

name: Dean's Auto Bus & Truck
districts_or_customers: Chicago Southland / South Chicago Heights area; potentially serves Park Forest-Chicago Heights SD 163 or nearby districts
recent_news: No M&A coverage. D&B / Manta classify the firm as 'contract trucking' rather than school bus operator; D&B records show only 1 employee and ~$71K revenue, inconsistent with the source-row's 56 employees / $2.9M revenue - suggests mis-classification or that this is a small auto/truck shop rather than a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Likely NOT a school-bus operator - public records describe contract trucking / auto-bus repair, not pupil transport. Source-row employee/revenue figures appear inflated vs. third-party data. De-prioritize pending direct verification.

name: D-N Ca Inc Which Will Do BUS
owner_or_parent: Likely a corporate shell / DBA entity - 2 N Riverside Plaza is a Class-A downtown Chicago office tower (not a bus yard); name structure ('X Inc Which Will Do BUS') is consistent with an out-of-state corporation registered to do business in IL under an assumed name
recent_news: No press, no website, no SAFER/FMCSA record located under this exact name. Address (2 N Riverside Plaza #600) is a corporate office floor, not a transportation depot.
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET in current form. Appears to be a corporate registration / holding entity (likely a foreign corp doing business in IL via assumed name 'BUS') headquartered out of a downtown office tower with no identifiable operating footprint. Could potentially be a subsidiary registration of a larger platform - requires IL Secretary of State corporate-records pull to disambiguate. De-prioritize until entity is identified.
